data.title: OM Holdings Files Updated ASX Corporate Governance Statement for 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

OM Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:OMH) ) has shared an announcement.

OM Holdings Limited has lodged its updated corporate governance statement for the financial year ended 31 December 2025, confirming board approval as of 21 April 2026 and providing access via its annual report and corporate website. The filing, accompanied by a completed Appendix 4G, affirms that the company adheres to key ASX Corporate Governance Council principles, including a formal board charter, pre-appointment checks for directors and executives, written appointment agreements, and direct board accountability for the company secretary.

These disclosures are intended to help investors and regulators easily locate and verify the company’s governance practices in line with ASX Listing Rules. By demonstrating full compliance across core governance recommendations, OM Holdings underscores its commitment to transparency and robust oversight, which may support investor confidence and align the group with best-practice standards expected of ASX-listed entities.

More about OM Holdings Ltd.

OM Holdings Limited is an ASX-listed company that reports under the Australian corporate governance framework. The group operates with a formal board and management structure, supported by documented charters and written agreements with directors and senior executives, and positions itself as a compliant participant in regulated capital markets.

Average Trading Volume: 94,522

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$210.2M

data.title: Alphamab’s KN026 Breast Cancer Trial Secures High-Profile ASCO 2026 Slot
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Alphamab Oncology ( (HK:9966) ) has issued an update.

Alphamab Oncology announced that phase III trial results for KN026, its anti-HER2 bispecific antibody co-developed with CSPC subsidiary JMT-Bio, in combination with albumin-bound docetaxel HB1801 as neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive breast cancer, have been selected for a Late-Breaking Abstract oral presentation at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The head-to-head study showed KN026 plus HB1801 significantly improved total pathological complete response versus the current standard regimen of trastuzumab, pertuzumab and docetaxel, suggesting the regimen could become a new standard of care and reinforcing Alphamab’s position in HER2-targeted oncology, while KN026 continues to advance through multiple registrational trials in breast and gastric cancers with regulatory designations in China and the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:9966) stock is a Buy with a HK$9.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alphamab Oncology stock, see the HK:9966 Stock Forecast page.

More about Alphamab Oncology

Alphamab Oncology is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative oncology therapies, including bispecific antibodies such as KN026. The company targets cancers driven by HER2 and other biomarkers, with a growing portfolio of late-stage clinical programs and partnerships that emphasize both domestic and international commercialization opportunities.

Average Trading Volume: 1,559,211

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$10.94B

Find detailed analytics on 9966 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Marvel Gold Calls 2026 AGM, Urges Shareholders to Lodge Proxies Early
data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Marvel Gold Ltd. ( (AU:MVL) ) has shared an announcement.

Marvel Gold Limited has convened its Annual General Meeting for shareholders to be held on 21 May 2026 at the company’s offices in Subiaco, Western Australia. The company will provide the Notice of Meeting primarily online, sending physical copies only to investors who have opted in, reflecting a continued shift toward digital communications in shareholder engagement.

Shareholders are strongly encouraged to vote in advance of the meeting by lodging proxy forms electronically, by mail, fax or mobile before the 19 May 2026 deadline, as late instructions will not be accepted. The emphasis on proxy voting underscores the company’s push for broad participation in governance matters, with investors advised to seek professional guidance if uncertain about how to vote on the AGM business.

More about Marvel Gold Ltd.

Marvel Gold Limited is an Australia-based resources company focused on gold exploration and development. The company operates within the mining and exploration sector and is listed for trading on the Australian market, with its shareholder base managed via Computershare Investor Services.

European Lithium ( (AU:EUR) ) just unveiled an update.

European Lithium Limited has updated the market on changes to its capital structure, reporting the cessation of a class of performance rights listed under the ASX security code EURAJ. The company advised that 30,000,000 of these performance rights were cancelled on 21 April 2026 by mutual agreement between the entity and the holder, reducing the number of such rights on issue.

The cancellation of this substantial block of performance rights may streamline the company’s equity structure and potentially lessen future dilution for existing shareholders. It also signals a renegotiation or conclusion of prior incentive or performance-based arrangements, which could have implications for management incentives and the company’s approach to capital management going forward.

data.title: ACME Solar Hits 2 GWh Storage Milestone in Rajasthan, Targets 10 GWh by 2027
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd. ( (IN:ACMESOLAR) ) has shared an announcement.

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd. has crossed a significant benchmark by cumulatively operationalising more than 2 GWh of battery energy storage system capacity in Rajasthan, making it one of the first Indian renewable energy players to deploy storage at this scale. The company’s operational battery portfolio in the state now totals 591.18 MW / 2,031.24 MWh across subsidiaries, supporting its plan to reach 10 GWh of storage capacity by 2027.

These battery projects are engineered to charge during off-peak periods and discharge during peak demand, enhancing grid reliability, improving power utilisation, and helping balance supply and demand on the network. The milestone strengthens ACME Solar’s position in India’s fast-growing renewable and storage market, signaling greater operational depth in managing intermittency and providing more stable power for offtakers and the broader grid ecosystem.

More about ACME Solar Holdings Ltd.

ACME Solar Holdings Ltd. is a leading integrated renewable energy company in India with a diversified 8,071 MW portfolio spanning solar, wind, energy storage, firm and dispatchable renewable energy, and hybrid solutions. It operates 2,990 MW of contracted capacity and about 2.0 GWh of battery energy storage, with a further 5,081 MW and roughly 15 GWh of storage under construction under long-term power purchase agreements.

Average Trading Volume: 145,454

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 172.9B INR

FireFly Metals ( (AU:FFM) ) has shared an update.

FireFly Metals has reported that all resolutions put to shareholders at its general meeting on 22 April 2026 were passed by poll with strong majorities. The approvals included an equal capital reduction with an in-specie distribution of shares, as well as ratifications of several prior equity issuances through charity, institutional, Canadian and share purchase plan placements.

The comprehensive endorsement of these resolutions effectively validates FireFly Metals’ recent capital management and fundraising activities. This support strengthens the company’s balance sheet flexibility and confirms shareholder backing for its current growth and financing strategy, which may enhance its ability to advance projects and maintain its dual-listed market presence.

data.title: Ardiden Options Lapse, Trimming Potential Diluted Share Capital
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ardiden ( (AU:ADV) ) has provided an announcement.

Ardiden Ltd has notified the market that 930,813 ADV-AQ options, which were due to expire on April 20, 2026 with an exercise price of $0.8385, have lapsed without being exercised. The cessation of these options marginally reduces the company’s potential diluted share capital, clarifying its capital structure for investors and removing these instruments from its outstanding securities on issue.

This administrative announcement signals that no additional shares will be created from this particular tranche of options, which can slightly limit future equity dilution for existing shareholders. While the move does not directly alter Ardiden’s current issued share count, it simplifies the mix of its listed securities and provides updated transparency on the company’s outstanding equity instruments.

More about Ardiden

Ardiden Ltd is an Australia-listed company trading under the ASX code ADV. The brief filing does not specify its industry or primary operations, but indicates it is an established listed entity managing a range of listed securities and options as part of its capital structure.
